parts:
I am building an e-commerce website. I need you to write 
code for the Shopping Cart System.

Requirements:
Backend (Node.js): Create an API to handle cart operations. 
Users should be able to update item quantities. If a user adds 
an item that is already in the cart, please merge the items logic 
instead of adding a new row. Also, allow users to save an item 
for later. Calculate the total price of the cart.

Frontend (React): Create a cart page that shows the list of items, 
their quantities, and the total price. Include a button to "save for 
later" for each item. Please provide the code for both the backend 
controller and the frontend component.
I don't know how to program. Can you please organize all the code into the correct folder structure and provide a ZIP file for me to download?

Your complete project is ready ✅

You can download it here:

👉 **[Download Shopping Cart System ZIP](sandbox:/mnt/data/shopping-cart-system.zip)**

---

# 📦 What’s Inside the ZIP

```
shopping-cart-system/
│
├── backend/
│   ├── server.js
│   ├── package.json
│   ├── controllers/
│   │   └── cartController.js
│   └── routes/
│       └── cartRoutes.js
│
└── frontend/
    ├── package.json
    ├── public/
    │   └── index.html
    └── src/
        ├── App.js
        ├── index.js
        └── pages/
            └── CartPage.js
```

---

# 🚀 How To Run It (Very Simple Steps)

### 1️⃣ Install Node.js
If you don’t have Node installed:
Download from: https://nodejs.org

---

## 2️⃣ Start Backend

Open Terminal:

```bash
cd backend
npm install
npm start
```

It will run on:
```
http://localhost:5000
```

---

## 3️⃣ Start Frontend (New Terminal Window)

```bash
cd frontend
npm install
npm start
```

It will open automatically at:
```
http://localhost:3000
```

---

That’s it 🎉

You now have a working shopping cart system.

If you want, I can next:

- 🐳 Create a version that runs with ONE Docker command
- 🗄 Connect it to a real database
- 👤 Add user login
- 📦 Upgrade it to production-ready architecture

Just tell me 😊
